branch.frontier_task_title: v6.5 bridge: Codify CLI help boundary and runtime-backed evidence rule
branch.branch_summary: After v6.4.0, advance v6.5 as Execution Hygiene + Human Recognition: preserve the rule that CLI help is routing evidence, runtime claims need executed command proof, safe local reads/writes are preapproved by run contract, and project/external/dangerous operations require per-run approval.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-070 sits on v6.5 after shipped v6.4.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Advance v6.5 as Execution Hygiene + Human Recognition: keep AOF runs bounded by minimal persistent context, on-demand skills/artifacts, work item session boundaries, small diffs, specialist actor composition, Council-ready handoff, approved run contracts, safe local command batching, and explicit approval for project/external/dangerous operations.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-070: v6.5 bridge: Codify CLI help boundary and runtime-backed evidence rule
